display_information.name: Threadwork
display_information.description: Turn any messy thread into a structured work post - decisions, tasks, related history, and a supervised agent action.
display_information.long_description: Threadwork is a Slack agent you @mention in any thread. It reads the conversation and converts it into durable work objects: a structured Canvas work post (decisions, open questions, summary), a Slack List of extracted tasks with owners, links to related past discussions found via the Real-Time Search API, and a supervised agent run - a card where the agent proposes to complete one task itself and executes only after a human clicks Approve. Conversation in. Accountable work out.
